        {"job_id": "JOB-007", "name": "certificate_renewal", "action": "manual_retry_after_cooldown", "status": "failed_acme_limit"}
      ]
    },
    "decomposition_rule": "1:10 - 万户(总览)->千户(自动修复/人工通知)->百户(具体任务执行)",
    "reporting_cycle": {
      "interval": "2小时",
      "milestones": [
        {"time": "T+0", "deliverable": "万户级配额方案确认"},

  }
}
